title: MyLuckyBlock
description: Add a lucky block that players can break to trigger random events.(400+ events)
body:
# Overview
Add a lucky block to Minecraft 1.21+ that players can break to trigger random events.

![Events](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fyhTamlR/images/673d61d709954be8063118f377acdab4b37d7b8f.png)

>Note: It's easy to make addons by using datapack. (Wiki coming soon~)

# How to play
## World Gen
Lucky Block will be generated in vanilla biomes.

![Worldgen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fyhTamlR/images/59fe080c144e57287428e2fdff7d27345d6bb5b4.png)

## Crafting
Lucky Block can be crafted with 8 gold ingots and 1 redstone block.

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fyhTamlR/images/3fe69bc6239303b6b0bfa8b7831289ea3a4b9995.png)

# Features
> Still Developing

- Drop Items
- Spawn Mobs
- Place Blocks
- Fall Blocks
- Place Chests
- Create Explosions
- Create Particles
- Send Messages
- Display Messages

# Attention
- May not English friendly?
- Memes from bilibili or somewhere
- Use SILK_TOUCH to avoid triggle events and drop itself

# Why
- Learn Minecraft Modding
- Have fun with my friends
- The original Lucky Block mod doesn't update to minecraft 1.21+
